				function calculateResult(pathnameParts) {
					var isVideo = pathnameParts.indexOf('video') >= 0;
					var isMatchCentre = pathnameParts.indexOf('match-centre') >= 0;
					var isArticle = pathnameParts.indexOf('news-story') >= 0;

					var sport = isVideo ? pathnameParts[1] : pathnameParts[0];
					sport = sportMap[sport] ? sportMap[sport] : sport;

					if (isVideo) {
						var title = pathnameParts[pathnameParts.length-1] ? pathnameParts[pathnameParts.length-1] : '';
						var videoId = title.split('!')[1];

								sport: sport,
							};
						}
					}
					if (isArticle) {
						var storyIdIndex = pathnameParts.indexOf('news-story') + 1;
						var storyId = pathnameParts[storyIdIndex];
						if (storyId) {
							return {
								storyId: storyId,
								sport: sport,
							};
						}
					}
					if (isMatchCentre) {
						var matchIdIndex = pathnameParts.indexOf('match-centre') + 1;
						var matchId = pathnameParts[matchIdIndex];
						if (matchId) {
							return {
								matchId: matchId,
								sport: sport,
							};
						}
					}
					return {};
				}
				var keys = {
					'league': "key_live_gjSCRLAs6mCkNoO4ZJ60ncgeEyaStoS1",
					'afl': "key_live_ocLwJQxr5iynOTqmUSr2ZebgACnKBtpj",
					'cricket': "key_live_aiVFRVqw8itb0hFio7gjgipcwwlOzzAK",

				};

				var sanitizeKey = sportMap[pathnameParts[index]] ? sportMap[pathnameParts[index]] : pathnameParts[index];

	const SEGCODE_REGEX = /segcode=(foxtelcustomer|foxtelaccount)/g;
	if(fetch){
		fetch("https://foxtel.demdex.net/event?d_rtbd=json", {
			"referrerPolicy": "strict-origin-when-cross-origin",
			"credentials": "include"
		}).then(response => response.json())
			.then(data => {
				const date = new Date();
				date.setDate(date.getDate() + 30);
				const stuff = data.stuff || [];
				const value = stuff.some(({cn, cv=''}) =>
					cn === 'foxsports' && cv.split(',').some((v = '') => v.match(SEGCODE_REGEX))
				) ? 1 : 0

			});
	}

			(function() {
				var pathname = window.location.pathname;
				var pathnameParts = pathname.split('/').filter(Boolean);
				var sportMap = {
					nrl: 'league'
				};

				function calculateResult(pathnameParts) {
					var isVideo = pathnameParts.indexOf('video') >= 0;
					var isMatchCentre = pathnameParts.indexOf('match-centre') >= 0;
					var isArticle = pathnameParts.indexOf('news-story') >= 0;

					var sport = isVideo ? pathnameParts[1] : pathnameParts[0];
					sport = sportMap[sport] ? sportMap[sport] : sport;

					if (isVideo) {
						var title = pathnameParts[pathnameParts.length-1] ? pathnameParts[pathnameParts.length-1] : '';
						var videoId = title.split('!')[1];
						if (videoId){
							return {
								videoId: videoId,
								sport: sport,
							};
						}
					}
					if (isArticle) {
						var storyIdIndex = pathnameParts.indexOf('news-story') + 1;
						var storyId = pathnameParts[storyIdIndex];
						if (storyId) {
							return {
								storyId: storyId,
								sport: sport,
							};
						}
					}
					if (isMatchCentre) {
						var matchIdIndex = pathnameParts.indexOf('match-centre') + 1;
						var matchId = pathnameParts[matchIdIndex];
						if (matchId) {
							return {
								matchId: matchId,
								sport: sport,
							};
						}
					}
					return {};
				}
				var keys = {
					'league': "key_live_gjSCRLAs6mCkNoO4ZJ60ncgeEyaStoS1",
					'afl': "key_live_ocLwJQxr5iynOTqmUSr2ZebgACnKBtpj",
					'cricket': "key_live_aiVFRVqw8itb0hFio7gjgipcwwlOzzAK",
					'default': "key_live_ecHqPx7nS3hiUEuAGCftxmffDqgvWRW2",
				};
				var index = pathnameParts[0] === 'video' ? 1 : 0;
				var sanitizeKey = sportMap[pathnameParts[index]] ? sportMap[pathnameParts[index]] : pathnameParts[index];
				var key = keys[sanitizeKey] ? keys[sanitizeKey] : keys.default;
				branch.init(key);
				branch.setBranchViewData({
					data: calculateResult(pathnameParts),
				});
			})();
		</script><script>
	const SEGCODE_REGEX = /segcode=(foxtelcustomer|foxtelaccount)/g;
	if(fetch){
		fetch("https://foxtel.demdex.net/event?d_rtbd=json", {
			"referrerPolicy": "strict-origin-when-cross-origin",
			"credentials": "include"
		}).then(response => response.json())
			.then(data => {
				const date = new Date();
				date.setDate(date.getDate() + 30);
				const stuff = data.stuff || [];
				const value = stuff.some(({cn, cv=''}) =>
					cn === 'foxsports' && cv.split(',').some((v = '') => v.match(SEGCODE_REGEX))
				) ? 1 : 0

				document.cookie='fs_isfoxtel='+ value +'; expires=' + date.toUTCString() + '; path=/';
			});
	}

			"credentials": "include"
		}).then(response => response.json())
			.then(data => {
				const date = new Date();
				date.setDate(date.getDate() + 30);
				const stuff = data.stuff || [];
				const value = stuff.some(({cn, cv=''}) =>
					cn === 'foxsports' && cv.split(',').some((v = '') => v.match(SEGCODE_REGEX))
				) ? 1 : 0

				document.cookie='fs_isfoxtel='+ value +'; expires=' + date.toUTCString() + '; path=/';
			});
	}
